result.nextStep: The forceUpdate pattern in SplitScreen (lines 165-168) still triggers re-renders on every terminalSessions change. Consider if this is still necessary now that the main useEffect is stable, or if the forceUpdate can be removed entirely since the terminalSessions effect at line 134 handles synchronization.
result.step: Fixed SplitScreen.tsx useEffect dependency issue - removed unstable sshDisconnect and setActiveSession from dependency array and used refs to access current values at call time. This prevents GoldenLayout from being unnecessarily destroyed and recreated when these Zustand action references change between renders.
